title: plantago major var. minima
intro: Plantago major var. minima, also known as small plantain, is a small variety of the common plantain plant, characterized by its smaller leaves and stems. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include its ability to reduce inflammation and swelling due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Plantago major var. minima include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through teas, infusions, and topical applications, as well as being dried and used as a tincture or capsule.
